claims.text: We claim: 1. Compounds of the formula ##STR5## wherein R 1 represents a fluoro-, chloro- or bromo-methyl group or a 2'-fluoroethyl group, R 2 represents a group COR 6 where R 6 is a C 1-3 alkyl group ...
